name: Matcha Fields Latte
description: Stone-ground ceremonial matcha, whisked with oat milk and finished with honey boba. The Chouchou signature.

name: Brown Sugar Pearl
description: Warm caramel notes, creamy milk, chewy brown sugar tapioca.

name: Peach Oolong
description: Delicate oolong with fresh white peach. Floral, fruity, bright.

name: Oolong Cream Cloud
description: Roasted oolong, sea-salted cream cheese foam top.

name: Taro Cloud Milk
description: Real taro purée, whole milk, velvety smooth.
